admission_gate: BLOCKED: requires GPT_OSS_120B_SOURCE_RELEASE_READINESS = AUTHORIZED (currently DENIED) AND explicit authorization for a gated ~751 GiB streamed transfer.

reference_235b.note: 235B (437.9 GiB) DOES fit resident after release; 397B does not.

one_parent_storage_law.statement: At most ONE giant parent's weight working set is resident at a time. The 120B source (60.8 GiB) must be RELEASED before the 397B streaming working set is admitted, to preserve the safety reserve and honor single-lease heavy compute.

residency.conclusion: 397B CANNOT be fully resident even after the 120B release (need 751.4 GiB, have 600.5 GiB after release) -> bounded shard-serial streaming is MANDATORY.

streaming_plan.method: bounded shard-serial streaming (extends the proven Q0 Range-GET header reader and doctor_v5 bounded reader): resident metadata (config/index/tokenizer, ~23 MB) addresses each tensor to its shard; stream one shard (~8.6 GiB), transform/measure the organ, flush, release, advance.
never: download weights before the 120B release is AUTHORIZED
